ocr_findings.description: Code block labels ('プログラム例 関数（戻り値あり）', '出力例') rendered as separate fenced code blocks in OCR rather than inline labels — cosmetic structural difference, no content lost

reviewer_notes: Page covers the return-value function example (sum function), explanation of the two-step call behavior, and the '手続（てつづき）' sidebar. All numbered annotation references (①②③) are preserved in both code and prose. The sidebar defining '手続' as '戻り値を持たない関数' is correctly captured. Page number 349 confirmed present.
